events.name: Manchester United at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Brighton were forced to settle for a place in the Conference League after Manchester United marked Michael Carrick's first match as permanent manager with a thumping 3-0 success and a record for Bruno Fernandes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton seal European spot despite Man Utd loss

headlines.description: Burnley came from behind to make sure the ignominy of finishing bottom of the Premier League went to Wolves as the two relegated sides fought out a 1-1 draw at Turf Moor.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burnley, Wolves draw to end disappointing season

headlines.description: Arsenal celebrated being crowned Premier League champions for the first time in 22 years with a 2-1 win against Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal celebrate PL title with win at Palace

headlines.description: Fulham gave Marco Silva a victory in what could be his final match in charge as Tom Cairney's second-half wondergoal helped earn a 2-0 Premier League win over Newcastle at Craven Cottage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fulham finish on high with win over Newcastle

headlines.description: Mohamed Salah came within the width of a post of signing off his Liverpool career with a spectacular goal but could at least claim an assist in the 1-1 draw with Brentford which guaranteed Champions League football.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah assist helps Liverpool clinch UCL place

headlines.description: Pep Guardiola was unable to sign off with one last victory as his glorious Manchester City reign ended in a 2-1 defeat to Aston Villa.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pep's City farewell spoiled by defeat to Villa

headlines.description: Bournemouth missed out on a Champions League place as Morgan Gibbs-White responded to being left out of England's World Cup squad by scoring for Nottingham Forest in a 1-1 draw.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bournemouth seal Europa League spot with draw

headlines.description: Sunderland completed their Premier League return in style after a 2-1 win over Chelsea confirmed their spot in the Europa League next season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea miss out on Europe in loss to Sunderland

headlines.description: João Palhinha's 43rd-minute goal fired Tottenham to Premier League safety with a 1-0 home win over Everton.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs beat Everton to save Premier League status

events.name: Leeds United at West Ham United

headlines.description: West Ham's final-day win over Leeds United was too little too late as they slumped to relegation from the Premier League.
headlines.shortLinkText: West Ham relegated despite 3-0 win over Leeds

keyEvents.text: Goal! Brighton and Hove Albion 0, Manchester United 1. Patrick Dorgu (Manchester United) header from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Bruno Fernandes with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Brighton and Hove Albion 0, Manchester United 2. Bryan Mbeumo (Manchester United) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Amad Diallo.
Kobbie Mainoo (Manchester United) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Brighton and Hove Albion 0, Manchester United 2.
Substitution, Brighton and Hove Albion. Yankuba Minteh replaces Maxim De Cuyper.

Goal! Brighton and Hove Albion 0, Manchester United 3. Bruno Fernandes (Manchester United) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Patrick Dorgu following a fast break.Goal awarded following VAR Review.
Substitution, Brighton and Hove Albion. Charalampos Kostoulas replaces Danny Welbeck.
Substitution, Brighton and Hove Albion. Solly March replaces Diego Gómez.
Substitution, Brighton and Hove Albion. Carlos Baleba replaces James Milner.
Substitution, Manchester United. Shea Lacey replaces Patrick Dorgu.
Substitution, Manchester United. Joshua Zirkzee replaces Bryan Mbeumo.
Substitution, Manchester United. Tyler Fletcher replaces Mason Mount.
Substitution, Brighton and Hove Albion. Georginio Rutter replaces Jack Hinshelwood.
Substitution, Manchester United. Leny Yoro replaces Noussair Mazraoui.
Substitution, Manchester United. Tyrell Malacia replaces Luke Shaw.

keyEvents.text: Goal! Burnley 0, Wolverhampton Wanderers 1. Adam Armstrong (Wolverhampton Wanderers) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
Hwang Hee-Chan (Wolverhampton Wanderers) is shown the yellow card.
Hannibal Mejbri (Burnley) is shown the yellow card.
First Half ends, Burnley 0, Wolverhampton Wanderers 1.
Goal! Burnley 1, Wolverhampton Wanderers 1. Zian Flemming (Burnley) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Loum Tchaouna.
Substitution, Wolverhampton Wanderers. Toti Gomes replaces Ladislav Krejcí.
Substitution, Burnley. Zeki Amdouni replaces Hannibal Mejbri.
Substitution, Wolverhampton Wanderers. Tolu Arokodare replaces Angel Gomes.
Substitution, Wolverhampton Wanderers. Hugo Bueno replaces David Møller Wolfe.
Substitution, Wolverhampton Wanderers. Jerome Abbey replaces Adam Armstrong.
Substitution, Burnley. James Ward-Prowse replaces Lesley Ugochukwu.
Substitution, Burnley. Marcus Edwards replaces Loum Tchaouna.
Substitution, Wolverhampton Wanderers. Pedro Lima replaces Rodrigo Gomes.
Substitution, Burnley. Ashley Barnes replaces Zian Flemming.
Substitution, Burnley. Jacob Bruun Larsen replaces Jaidon Anthony.
Ashley Barnes (Burnley) is shown the yellow card.
Yerson Mosquera (Wolverhampton Wanderers) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, Burnley 1, Wolverhampton Wanderers 1.
